title: 151 Products 48MM X 10M ADHESIVE ALUMINIUM FOIL TAPE PIPES...
features: WATER & HEAT RESISTANT: 151 Adhesives Aluminium Foil Tape, both water & heat resistant suitable for pipe lagging, duct sealing, heating and ventilation.

AIR & WATERTiGHT SEAL: 151 Adhesives Aluminium Foil Tape, ideal for sealing joints/seams against leakage, moisture and vapour. Ideal for holding or masking applications requiring a foil backing protection.
STRONG & DURABLE : 151 Adhesives Aluminium Foil Tape, bonds to a wide range of surfaces materials, wood, metal and glass. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use 151 Aluminium Tape roll, 48mm x 10 metres. Store at room temperature
